SEQUENCE.NAME: %challengeDependenciesRs/dependencyEffectiveDate%=='PERIODENDDATE'||%challengeDependenciesRs/dependencyEffectiveDate%=='PERIODSTARTDATE'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if PERIODENDDATE or PERIODSTARTDATE map to date from challenge periods

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: no challenges for this challenge code for current week

Values.value: Cannot get the challenge period effective from and challenge period effective to date for evaluating the dependency.

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: if CURRENTDATE or empty map current date
--- If EventDate is present do nothing ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: VE-1376-effTodate mapping--call get entity points event history service

BRANCH.COMMENT: check event menmonics matching with dependency id

MAP.NAME: %pointsDetailInfo/pointsDetail/pointsEvents/entityPointsEvents/eventInformation/eventMnemonic%=%dependencyIDs%
MAP.COMMENT: event mnemonics matching with dependecy id, count the no of records returned
form search string by appending resultSetFor_
--- ALTVE-198 form search string with regex ---
--- ALTVE-198 Added regex as true substitute value in formula for events ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: check partner code matching with dependency id

MAP.NAME: %getTransactionResponse/transactions/partnerCode%=%partnerDetails[0]%
MAP.COMMENT: partner code matching with dependecy id, count the no of records returned
form search string by appending resultSetFor_
substitute value in formula for transaction id

BRANCH.COMMENT: check partner code matching with dependency id

MAP.NAME: %getBenefitsResponse/benefits/partnerCode%=%partnerDetails[0]%
MAP.COMMENT: partner code matching with dependecy id, count the no of records returned
form search string by appending resultSetFor_
substitute value in formula for dependency id
set number of record default value
form search string by appending resultSetFor_
substitute value in formula for challenge code
